summary: Iteration 2 verification: scheduler startup, CMS payload, pricing_meta PATCH (admin vs worker), bulk image upload, variations endpoint, ProductDetailDialog UI, multi-file upload UI, ImageVariationsDialog UI, and dashboard sanity. All 10 backend pytest tests passed (32s). Frontend flows confirmed via Playwright on the public URL — Save shows 'Saving...' state, Copy CMS works, multi-upload toast 'Uploaded 2' shown, variations dialog opens with Enhance/Generate alternates buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetailDialog 'Save' button shows 'Saving...' but no toast is fired by parent on PATCH success — consider surfacing a confirmation toast for clearer UX feedback.

Worker patching with pricing_meta is silently stripped. While correct per spec, returning a 200 with no error message for a security-relevant decision could mislead clients during integration debugging — consider an audit log entry already covered by activity_log.

/api/admin/images/{id}/enhance returns 500 if Gemini rejects the image — error message bubbled raw to client. Consider mapping to 422 'Image not enhanceable' for clarity (acceptable per current spec).
Token storage: page.evaluate localStorage.getItem('token') returned empty length — verify FE stores token under a consistent key (likely 'auth' object). Not blocking, just noted.
test_credentials: Admin admin@gemsandluxury.com / Admin@123 ; Worker worker@gemsandluxury.com / Worker@123
seed_data_creation: Test created 4 PNG image_assets (1 single + 3 bulk + 2 UI bulk) and 1-2 generated_products via /api/products/generate. Cleanup not performed; test data is small and identifiable by uploaded_by=admin in this iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 fully passed. New backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py. Iteration 1 tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py untouched. To run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<public_url> python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v. Backend log confirms scheduler startup line on every restart. Bulk upload endpoint accepts multipart files=[] and returns {uploaded, errors, count}. CMS payload requires admin/manager role.

evidence.scheduler_log: grep 'scheduler started' /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log shows 'scheduler started — auto punch-out every 2m'

ui_validation.AdminProducts View dialog: All testids visible (detail-price, meta-quality/complexity/tier/uplift/reasoning, detail-save, copy-cms). Patch persisted final_price=234 and uplift=0.25.
ui_validation.AdminImages bulk: file input has 'multiple' attr; uploading 2 files showed 'Uploaded 2' toast; 9 image cards rendered.
ui_validation.ImageVariationsDialog: Opens on card click; shows source image, Enhance + Generate alternates buttons, and 'No variations yet' empty state.
